raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Stop-as-yield for cyclists will make riding a bike safer.",
    "Intersections are where cyclists are most at-risk.",
    "Only 4% of cyclists say they come to a complete stop at intersections.",
    "Being forced to come to a full stop means cyclists spend more time regaining speed to match traffic and more time inside intersections, exposing them to greater risk of collisions with autos.",
    "Delaware passed a similar law in 2017 which saw a 23% reduction in crashes involving bicycles at intersections.",
    "AB 1713 is intended to incentivize cyclists to ride on side streets and off car-heavy thoroughfares and intersections."
  ]
```
